title: Thaiyaga Maariduven Song Lyrics Tamil
stanzas:
va va ennuyire
meendum oru jananam kodu
vaadaa en magane
thanthai ena pathavi kodu

siryavan naan siriyavanthaan
ulagin parvaiyile
periyavan thaan periyavanthaan
unthan kankalile

medhuvaa medhuvaa
unai naan anaikka
uyirum uyirum
ondraai inaikka

O sithiriyai nee senthamizh nee
vaarthaigal illai azhaika
sooriyan nee vinveli nee
yaelai kaiyil rathinam nee
tamilStanzas:
வா, வா என்னுயிரே
மீண்டும் ஒரு ஜெனனம் கொடு
வாடா என் மகனே
தந்தை என பதவி கொடு

சிறியவன் நான் சிறியவன்தான்
உலகின் பார்வையிலே
பெரியவன் நான் பெரியவன்தான்
உந்தன் கண்களிலே

மெதுவா, மெதுவா
உனை நான் அணைக்க
உயிரும், உயிரும்
ஒன்றாய் இணைக்க

ஓ சித்திரை நீ, செந்தமிழ் நீ
வார்த்தைகள் இல்லை அழைக்க
சூரியன் நீ, விண்வெளி நீ
ஏழை கையில் ரத்தினம் நீ

தாயாக மாறிடுவேன்,
உனக்காக!
தவறிய நான் மண்டியிட்டேன்,
உனையேந்த!
ஹஹஹ ஹஹஹ ஹஹஹா
ஹஹஹ ஹஹஹ ஹஹஹா

The song conveys deep emotions of love and devotion, expressing a longing for connection.

In the movie, the song reflects the protagonist's emotional struggles and romantic aspirations.

enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song Thaiyaga Maariduven, the protagonist expresses profound feelings of love and longing, beautifully encapsulated through its poignant lyrics. The melody evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. As the song unfolds, it conveys the emotional depth of relationships, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. This enchanting piece from the movie Dada is sure to leave listeners captivated and reflective.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thaiyaga Maariduven is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing, making it a perfect addition to any romantic playlist. With its heartfelt lyrics and soothing composition, this song from the upcoming film Dada is set to resonate deeply with listeners. Experience the emotional journey as the song unfolds, inviting you to lose yourself in its enchanting vibe.
stanzaMeanings: I will sacrifice for you... I have come to you without fail.
Come, my life, give me another birth; let my son be the one to give me that honor.
I am a small person in this world, but in your eyes, I am someone great.
I will embrace you, my love, and our souls will unite as one.
Oh, you are the beauty, you are the Tamil language; you have no words to cry, you are the sun, you are the moon, you hold the gem in your hand.
I will sacrifice for you... I have come to you without fail.
